name: Snicker Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crust by using either Deep Dish Graham Cracker or a Chocolate crust.
2. In a double boiler, melt together the Snicker bars, peanut butter, and Half & Half.
3. Once melted, fold in the 4 cups of Cool Whip until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Allow to freeze for 4-5 hours before serving.
6. Top with additional Cool Whip and chocolate syrup before serving.
